title: IEEE-CIS Fraud Detection
methodology: Imbalanced binary classification with temporal and graph features. LightGBM baseline on engineered tabular features (transaction-level deltas, card aggregations, time-of-day, device-OS interactions, frequency encodings) with chronological 5-fold CV. Advanced model: heterogeneous GraphSAGE on a card-merchant-device tri-partite graph with focal loss and 5x positive-edge oversampling, built with PyTorch Geometric. HGT alternative backbone, CatBoost ensemble fallback.
blockers: Dataset not auto-downloaded: IEEE-CIS Fraud Detection is behind Kaggle competition rules acceptance (web-only) and weighs ~700 MB. The kaggle CLI command and post-extraction layout are documented in data/README.md; user runs `kaggle competitions download -c ieee-fraud-detection` manually after accepting the rules at https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/ieee-fraud-detection.
